lines.speaker: robin_hood
lines.text: You deduce, I shoot. Perfect partnership.

lines.speaker: sherlock
lines.text: I prefer the term 'complementary skillsets.'

lines.speaker: robin_hood
lines.text: Fancy words for 'I need a bodyguard.'

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: You're not wicked at all, are you?

lines.speaker: wicked_witch
lines.text: Tell anyone and I'll turn you into a toad.

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: That's the nicest threat I've ever received.

lines.speaker: dracula
lines.text: We were the villains.

lines.speaker: frankenstein
lines.text: Were.

lines.speaker: dracula
lines.text: Yes. Were.

lines.speaker: peter_pan
lines.text: Strange fighting beside you.

lines.speaker: captain_hook
lines.text: Strange not trying to kill you.

lines.speaker: peter_pan
lines.text: ...Do you miss it?

lines.speaker: captain_hook
lines.text: Every single day.

lines.speaker: phantom
lines.text: They feared your face.

lines.speaker: frankenstein
lines.text: They feared yours too.

lines.speaker: phantom
lines.text: Yes. But mine was by CHOICE.

lines.speaker: frankenstein
lines.text: ...Frankenstein had no choice. In anything.

lines.speaker: phantom
lines.text: Then let us MAKE choices. Starting now.

lines.speaker: scrooge
lines.text: I built walls of gold to fill the emptiness.

lines.speaker: shadow_author
lines.text: I built walls of ink.

lines.speaker: scrooge
lines.text: Same emptiness.

lines.speaker: shadow_author
lines.text: ...Yes. Same emptiness.

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: Your Majesty... are you HELPING us?

lines.speaker: queen_of_hearts
lines.text: I'm helping MYSELF. You just happen to benefit.

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: That's... actually very Wonderland logic.

lines.speaker: tarzan
lines.text: You hunted my family.

lines.speaker: clayton
lines.text: I was rewritten. That wasn't... that wasn't me.

lines.speaker: tarzan
lines.text: Tarzan knows. Tarzan also knows... you are trying. That is enough.

lines.speaker: merlin
lines.text: Four hundred years of darkness. How did you survive?

lines.speaker: dracula
lines.text: I kept a music box. My mother's lullaby.

lines.speaker: merlin
lines.text: Even immortals need something to hold onto.

lines.speaker: medusa
lines.text: They cursed me for something I didn't do.

lines.speaker: wicked_witch
lines.text: They cursed me for existing.

lines.speaker: medusa
lines.text: Sisters in suffering.

lines.speaker: wicked_witch
lines.text: Sisters in SURVIVAL.

lines.speaker: anubis
lines.text: I have judged millions of hearts. Yours weighs almost nothing.

lines.speaker: scrooge
lines.text: Is that... good?

lines.speaker: anubis
lines.text: It means you carry no guilt. The redeemed heart is the lightest of all.

lines.speaker: headless_horseman
lines.text: You hide behind a mask. I have no face to hide.

lines.speaker: phantom
lines.text: Perhaps that's freedom.

lines.speaker: headless_horseman
lines.text: No. It is forgetting. I would give anything to remember who I was.

lines.speaker: phantom
lines.text: ...Then let me play you a song. Music remembers everything.

lines.speaker: robin_hood
lines.text: You know, in some versions of my story, I never grow old either.

lines.speaker: peter_pan
lines.text: Is that supposed to make me feel better about growing up?

lines.speaker: robin_hood
lines.text: It's supposed to remind you — legends don't age. We just get better stories.

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: I'm not afraid of you.

lines.speaker: medusa
lines.text: Everyone is afraid of me. That's the whole POINT.

lines.speaker: alice
lines.text: I went to Wonderland. I've had tea with madness. You're just a woman with unusual hair.

lines.speaker: medusa
lines.text: ...No one has ever called me 'just a woman' before. Thank you.

lines.speaker: frankenstein
lines.text: You are missing... a piece. Frankenstein understands.

lines.speaker: headless_horseman
lines.text: My head. My memories. Everything I was.

lines.speaker: frankenstein
lines.text: Frankenstein was made from MANY pieces. None of them were mine. But the heart? The heart became mine. Yours will too.
